---
pagetitle: "Workshop 2026 - How to use AI to conduct a technical analysis - AI Management of Query"
toc: true
toc-location: right
page-layout: article
---

::: {.page-header}
[Contributed Talk]{.page-header-badge .badge-upcoming}

# How to use AI to conduct a technical analysis - AI Management of Query

[Simon Michaux · Contributed Speaker]{.tagline}

::: {.meta}
[Day 1]{} [June 1, 2026]{} [AIEPS Workshop 2026]{} [30 min]{}
:::

::: {.actions}
[Back to Programme](../2026.qmd#programme){.btn-act .secondary}
[Speaker Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/simonmichaux/){.btn-act .primary target="_blank"}
:::
:::

::: {.content-body .session-detail}

## Abstract

How to use AI platforms in a way to manage the outcome. I use multiple AI tabs in parallel and then make a map of the analysis to keep contextual track of when the analysis is stable and finished.

## Speaker Bio

[Simon Michaux](https://www.linkedin.com/in/simonmichaux/) is a contributed speaker at AIEPS 2026 and will present in person.

## Materials and Images

- Slides: To be added.
- Related links: To be added.
- Images: To be added.

:::
